headline: RBA holds rates, dovish tilt in forward guidance
summary: RBA kept rates unchanged but softened language on inflation risks, signaling possible cuts ahead.

headline: US payrolls beat expectations with 275K jobs added
summary: March NFP surpassed consensus of 200K, with revisions higher. Unemployment rate steady at 3.7%, pressuring AUD/USD lower.

headline: China PMI data softer than expected in March
summary: Manufacturing PMI fell to 49.2 vs 50.1 expected, raising concerns about growth momentum and weighing on AUD.

headline: AUD/GBP options activity surges near range highs
summary: Large call buying in AUD/GBP observed, consistent with breakout positioning above key resistance.

headline: PBOC sets stronger CNH fixing amid capital outflow concerns
summary: PBOC set CNH midpoint fix stronger than expected, tightening offshore liquidity and pressuring AUD/CNH.

headline: Iron ore prices surge on restocking demand
summary: Iron ore futures rallied 4.5% on strong restocking demand from mills, supporting AUD across the board.

headline: IMF revises global growth forecasts lower
summary: IMF cut 2026 global GDP forecast to 2.8% from 3.1%, citing trade uncertainty weighing on commodity currencies.

headline: UK Spring Budget includes spending restraint measures
summary: Chancellor announced spending cuts and targeted tax increases, weakening GBP and lifting AUD/GBP.

headline: Australia employment surges past expectations
summary: Australia added 52K jobs vs 25K expected, unemployment fell to 3.9%, boosting AUD broadly.

headline: China trade surplus widens on weak imports
summary: China trade surplus expanded as imports contracted 2.1%, signaling softer domestic demand and CNH weakness.
